free_text: from the 5.23 MeV unnatural parity state of 24Mg
An array of up to four Si(Li) detectors
mounted in the 0RIC 76 cm scattering chamber.
The targets used were self-supporting foils of
enriched 24Mg from 350 to 2040 mu-g/cm2 thick; the
thicker targets were used at backward angles.
Errors ranged from 5% at forward angles
